study.title: Study guide
study.introBefore: Read through every question and model answer, then go to
study.gotoPracticeHint: Practice uses topics marked as studied. If none are marked yet, it falls back to your full due queue.
study.showUntouchedOnly: Show only topics I haven’t practiced
study.untouchedFilterBanner: Showing subtopics where you haven’t answered any question in Practice yet.
study.untouchedFilterEmpty: Every visible topic has at least one practiced question — or turn this filter off to see the full guide.
study.loadError: Could not load questions. Check that assets are available and try again.
study.markStudiedAria: Mark topic as studied for today
study.planAllStudiedMessage: You’ve studied everything you planned for today.
study.filteredTodayBanner: Showing topics from today’s plan (read items stay listed, collapsed). Open the Study guide from the main menu to see everything.
study.practicedTodayAria: You answered this question in Practice today

plan.title: Plan for today
plan.intro: Choose topics you want to cover today, read them in the Study guide, then practice. Your plan resets at midnight (local time).
plan.toStudyEmpty: No topics left to read, or none selected yet.
plan.doneEmpty: Mark topics as studied from the Study guide when you finish reading them.
plan.pickHint: Check the boxes for the subtopics you want in today’s plan.
plan.lastStudiedNeverAria: No recorded study or practice in this topic yet

heatmap.heading: Activity
heatmap.description: Each square is a day. Tap a day for totals and topics. Intensity reflects practice answers plus topics marked as studied.
heatmap.gridAria: Daily activity over the past weeks
heatmap.noTopicHistory: Topic names are saved for new activity from now on. Older days may only show totals.
heatmap.noActivityThatDay: No practice or study logged for this day.

aboutPage.title: About the project
aboutPage.name1: The name “Karkas” comes from the idea of a foundation — a structure or framework on which everything else is built.
aboutPage.name2: In the context of interviews, it represents the core structure of an answer: once the foundation is clear, the details can be added naturally and confidently.
aboutPage.privacyNotice: Your practice data is stored in your browser only. Nothing is sent to a server — your progress stays private and visible only to you.
aboutPage.purpose1: Karkas is an interview training application designed to help developers turn knowledge into clear, confident answers.
aboutPage.purpose2: Instead of passively learning concepts, you actively practice answering real interview questions under time pressure.
aboutPage.purpose3: The goal is to improve recall, structure thinking, and develop the ability to communicate technical ideas effectively — the skill that often determines success in interviews.
aboutPage.howIntro: The flow is built around short, focused sessions:
aboutPage.step0Desc: On the Plan page, pick subtopics you want to study today. After you read them in the Study guide, mark each topic as studied. Practice then stays limited to those topics until you change the plan.
aboutPage.step1Desc: Read each question with weak, technical, and interview-style model answers so you know what a strong answer sounds like.
aboutPage.step2Desc: In Practice, you get a question and a timer. Answer as you would in a real interview, then compare with the model answers.
aboutPage.step3Desc: Rate how it went: didn’t know, partial, or nailed it. That shapes what you see next and when each question returns for review.
aboutPage.step4Desc: The Progress view highlights weak topics, shows an activity heatmap of recent days, and uses spaced repetition so harder items come back sooner than easy ones.
aboutPage.data1: Stats, ratings, your daily topic plan, and per-day activity for the heatmap are saved only in your browser (local storage). They are not uploaded or synced to the cloud.
aboutPage.data2: If you use another device or browser, that copy of the app will not have your history. Clear site data in the browser to reset progress.
aboutPage.tagline: Train the habit of speaking your technical knowledge out loud.

quiz.loadError: Could not load questions. Check that assets are available and try again.
quiz.fallbackHintDone: No questions were due for review, so all questions were shown.
quiz.fallbackHintActive: Nothing due right now — practicing from the full set.
quiz.planFocusHint: You have topics selected for today but none marked as studied yet. After you mark topics in the Study guide, Practice will use only those questions. Until then, you still practice from the full set (or due reviews).
quiz.practicingFullBankHint: Full bank mode: every question in the list is included, not only items due for spaced review.
quiz.fallbackHintTodaysTopics: Nothing in your studied topics is due for review yet — practicing every question in those topics for now.
quiz.fallbackHintDoneTodaysTopics: No questions in your studied topics were due for review, so this round used all questions in those topics.
quiz.planTopicsCoveredBody: Nothing in the topics you studied today is due for spaced review right now. You can keep practicing every question in those topics, or switch to the full question bank (all topics).

dashboard.title: Interview Progress
dashboard.weakHint: No weak spots detected yet (need at least 3 attempts on a topic below 60% nailed).
dashboard.activeTimeProgressLabel: Illustrative progress toward 10,000 h (popular anecdote, not a goal)
dashboard.activeTimeDisclaimer: Counts seconds with Practice, Study guide, or Plan open while this browser tab is in the foreground. Background tabs are not counted. Time with the tab visible but idle still counts. This is not a measure of mastery.
dashboard.activeTimeTenKHint: The “10,000 hours” idea is a simplified popular story about expertise — use this tally as motivation, not a scientific benchmark.
dashboard.practiceRatingsIntro: How you rated answers after each question (Nailed it, Partial, Didn’t know). If you repeat the same question the same day, only your best rating that day is counted in the daily and “all days” totals.
dashboard.practiceRatingsAllDays: All days (best per question per day)
dashboard.practiceRatingsAllDaysHint: Each calendar day, each question counts once — as your strongest rating that day — then summed over every stored day.
dashboard.practiceRatingsEveryAttemptHint: Every time you submitted a rating in Practice, including repeats the same day. Same numbers as used for Accuracy and Confidence above.
dashboard.practiceRatingsEmptyDay: No practice ratings recorded yet today.
dashboard.practiceRatingsEmptyAllDays: No per-day ratings stored yet. New practice sessions will fill this in.
